name_en: With full packaging)!!️【New】GG Extra Mini Shoulder Bag
name_cn:
With full packaging)!!️【New】GG Extra Mini Shoulder Bag
This piece is from the Gucci Lido series, inspired by the summer vibes and beach clubs of the Italian coast. The new small leather goods series playfully uses vibrant colors to present eye-catching new works. This shoulder bag features a classic silhouette, cleverly paired with a button closure and internal hook clasp for easy attachment of matching wallets or clutches. The new light blue and brown GG canvas complements the brown leather trim, while the double-G accessories add a bright touch.
Model: 783141.
Size: 16.5(W)x 9.5(H)x 4.5cm(D)
Color: Brown/Light Blue Canvas.
